summary: Comprehensive testing of Voice-First VoiceStage feature replacing old text-chat ZitexDuo. All 14 frontend tests passed (100%). Backend /api/avatar/chat working with voice response. New full-body transparent PNG characters (Zara/Layla) load correctly. VoiceStage UI fully functional with all controls (close, mute, swap, mic, transcript toggle). Mobile viewport (400x800) works correctly. Regression tests passed for all other pages.
critical_code_review_comments: VoiceStage.js well-structured with proper state management for character animations
ZitexDuoLauncher.js correctly replaces old ZitexDuo with voice-first approach
Character entrance animation uses proper CSS transitions (1.2s cubic-bezier)
Fallback images (f1_zara.png, f2_layla.png) properly configured via onError handlers
Web Speech API detection (SR) handles browser compatibility gracefully
ESLint warning: useCallback missing 'handleUserSpeech' dependency - minor, doesn't affect functionality

test_credentials.note: VoiceStage doesn't require login - works on landing page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Voice-First VoiceStage feature fully tested. Key findings: (1) ZitexDuoLauncher replaces old ZitexDuo on landing page, (2) Clicking any launcher (Zara, Layla, or center CTA) opens VoiceStage overlay, (3) VoiceStage has all required elements: vs-close, vs-mute, vs-swap, vs-zara, vs-layla, vs-subtitle, vs-mic-btn, vs-transcript-toggle, (4) Character entrance animation takes ~2.5s with staggered timing, (5) Swap button toggles primary character and updates subtitle, (6) Mute button toggles audio playback, (7) Transcript toggle shows/hides conversation history, (8) Close button unmounts VoiceStage and shows launchers again, (9) All character PNGs have RGBA mode with alpha channel (transparent backgrounds), (10) Mobile viewport (400x800) works correctly with responsive character sizing, (11) Backend /api/avatar/chat returns both 'reply' and 'audio_url' (base64 mp3), (12) Old ZitexDuo.js still exists but is NOT imported on LandingPage - replaced by ZitexDuoLauncher.

features_verified.character_images_load: ✅ All avatar PNGs return HTTP 200 (zara_wave, layla_wave, zara_idle, layla_idle)
features_verified.character_images_transparent: ✅ All PNGs have RGBA mode with alpha channel
features_verified.voice_stage_elements: ✅ All 8 VoiceStage elements present (close, mute, swap, zara, layla, subtitle, mic-btn, transcript-toggle)
features_verified.swap_button_works: ✅ Swap toggles primary character, subtitle shows 'تحوّلت لرفيقتك الثانية ✨'
features_verified.zara_launcher_opens_zara: ✅ Clicking Zara launcher opens VoiceStage with primary='zara'
features_verified.layla_launcher_opens_layla: ✅ Clicking Layla launcher opens VoiceStage with primary='layla'
features_verified.mobile_viewport: ✅ All elements visible and functional on 400x800 viewport
features_verified.regression_landing_sections: ✅ Hero title and cards (image, video, website) present

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI TTS for audio_url)
